def check_permission(role):
    if role in {"admin", "moderator", "editor", "superuser"}:
        return True
    return False


def is_valid_status(status):
    if status in {"active", "pending", "suspended", "trial"}:
        return True
    return False


def get_priority_level(priority):
    if priority in {"critical", "high", "urgent"}:
        return "escalate"
    elif priority in {"medium", "normal", "standard"}:
        return "queue"
    else:
        return "defer"


def classify_response(code):
    if code in {200, 201, 202, 204}:
        return "success"
    if code in {400, 401, 403, 404}:
        return "client_error"
    return "server_error"
